_note: Machine-readable companion to docs/pinyin-generation-guide.md. 多音字 (polyphone) reading overrides + sandhi rules for generating pinyin on bilingual Chinese cards (HSK reading posters, flashcards, caption overlays). Consume in a pinyin pass (e.g. after pypinyin) to force the correct reading in context. Keep in sync with the doc's tables.

yi.rule: citation yī only when counting/standalone/final/ordinal; yì before 1st/2nd/3rd tone; yí before 4th tone; neutral in verb reduplication (看一看)

bu.rule: bù normally; bú ONLY before a 4th tone

着.context: 笑着 zhe / 着急 zháo

得.context: 跑得快 de / 得到 dé / 得走 děi

为.context: 因为/为了 wèi / 成为 wéi

还.context: 还有 hái / 还书 huán

乐.context: 快乐 lè / 音乐 yuè

少.context: 多少 shǎo / 少年 shào

教.context: 教书 jiāo / 教室 jiào

空.context: 天空 kōng / 有空 kòng

称.context: 称象 chēng / 称心 chèn

差.context: 差不多 chà / 差别 chā
